title: 'Everest Man' and 'Mountain Queen' break own records scaling world's tallest peak
summary_full: Kami Rita Sherpa and Lakpa Sherpa summited Everest for the 32nd and 11th time, respectively.
summary_public: Kami Rita Sherpa and Lakpa Sherpa summited Everest for the 32nd and 11th time, respectively.
